METHOD: Add JSDoc @param/@return type annotations, type guards, or casts. Do NOT use @ts-ignore/@ts-nocheck. Do NOT change runtime behavior. Do NOT weaken tsconfig. After fixing, run tsc again to verify 0 errors, then git-add + git-commit.

COMMON FIXES:
- TS7005/7006 (implicit any): add /** @param {string} name */ JSDoc
- TS18046 (type of computed value any): add type annotation or cast: /** @type {Record<string, string>} */
- TS2339 (property does not exist): use type assertion or define the type
- TS7053 (implicit any index): add index signature via @type
- TS2322/2345 (type mismatch): add type annotation to match expected type
